The '''Langhesi''' were a race of red-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Langhesa]], presumably in the [[Langhesa system/Legends|Langhesa system]]. The Langhesi could mold and shape life into new forms. They spoke [[Langhesan]].

In [[129 BBY]], their homeworld was conquered and the species was enslaved by the [[Tsinimal]]s who saw their technology as a sin against their gods. Because of this, the Langhesi engaged in a mass migration across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They specialized in producing unique pets for the rich of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

In [[89 BBY]], some Langhesi migrated to the living world of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. These were responsible for shaping Sekotan technology and building the massive [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] on Zonama Sekot. The Langhesi composed approximately 3% of the population of the planet (This figure would later grow to 20% of Zonama Sekot's population by the time of the Legacy Era).
